BackstoryDef.title: Ancient spiritual child
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] is born with spirit root, and [PAWN_nameDef] arrived at Foundation rank in [PAWN_possessive] teens. Not afraid of fire and water, free to move a hundred jin stone lock,[PAWN_pronoun] was regarded as a genius by the clan, thus carefully cultivated.

BackstoryDef.title: Ancient clan child
BackstoryDef.description: [PAWN_nameDef] born in a small clan, [PAWN_pronoun] did not have any special talents or outstanding advantages, and spent [PAWN_possessive] childhood smoothly.

BackstoryDef.title: Ancient restless child
BackstoryDef.description: When [PAWN_nameDef] was a child, because [PAWN_pronoun] contradicted the cultivators, [PAWN_pronoun] was punished to join the cultivators' clan and become a servant. However, a few years later, [PAWN_pronoun] revealed [PAWN_possessive] eloquence, and was liked by many people in the clan, [PAWN_pronoun] also broke away from the servant identity and became a member of the clan.
